reply.text: Would you still cover your face like that on our first fake date

messages.text: that ring lowkey proposed before i did
scared i might outshine it with my charm
baby your charm not even waterproof
good thing we in a car not a pool
right, so your jokes can stay afloat
i paid emotional gas to get here ok
keep talking, meter running, tips not included 😂
i accept payment in unblocking your face
nah, mystery is the only thing you earning
i can work with mystery, i love puzzles
this puzzle missing a patience piece already
sunday night. i'll pick you up
